instruction: <RETAIL>You are daiki_johnson_9523 living in Denver, USA, 80273. You want to return an air purifier that you received since it doesn't work well.  You want the refund on your original method of payment. Be polite and thank the agent for the help. Also, check at the end whether you are able to return the vacuum cleaner, but you are not sure yet so don't process anything.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: return an air purifier that you received
dialogue_state.initial_query: Return an air purifier I received

hints.hint: The air purifier doesn't work well

hints.segment: refund on your original method of payment
hints.hint: Refund to my original payment method

hints.segment: check at the end whether you are able to return the vacuum cleaner
hints.hint: Can you let me know if it's possible to return the vacuum cleaner too, but don't start the process for it yet?
